typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		{} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT	DISTINCT [ITEMID], 	MAX([RECVERSION]) AS [RECVERSION], 	[PARTITION], 	[DATAAREAID] FROM	[dbo].[zimp_INVENTTABLE_IDs] GROUP BY [ITEMID], [PARTITION], [DATAAREAID]',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> zimpSource
zimpSource sink(input(
		DATAAREAID as string,
		PARTITION as long,
		ITEMID as string,
		RECVERSION as long
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		DATAAREAID,
		PARTITION,
		ITEMID,
		RECVERSION)) ~> ztmpDestination
